title: Celiac screening result review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports symptoms, risk groups, gluten exposure context, and clinician-reviewed serology without automatic diagnosis.
investigations.rationale: The exact testing section supports symptom and risk context, gluten exposure, IgA or serology status, and clinician review of an existing screening result without interpreting it automatically.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports symptoms, risk groups, gluten exposure context, and clinician-reviewed serology without automatic diagnosis.

source.title: Coeliac disease: recognition, assessment and management — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.4 — recognition, serology, and referral context

investigations.text: Supports persistent symptoms, weight, height, dietary adherence discussion, complications, reviewed tests, and clinician-entered follow-up.
investigations.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports clinician-entered discussion and follow-up when a coeliac diagnosis already exists; it does not convert a screening result into a diagnosis.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports persistent symptoms, weight, height, dietary adherence discussion, complications, reviewed tests, and clinician-entered follow-up.

source.title: Coeliac disease: recognition, assessment and management — Recommendations

sources_used.title: Coeliac disease: recognition, assessment and management — Recommendations

source_limitations: Exact assay, value, reference range, IgA status, gluten intake, interpretation, diagnosis, biopsy, referral, and follow-up interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
